Sep 19, 2001 LMITOOL on the Instructional Systems ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ LMITOOL Availability -------------------- LMITOOL is a software tool for formulating and solving semidefinite programming problems (autho

olving semidefinite programming problems (authors: Laurent El-Ghaoui and Luigi Palopoli). LMITOOL and TKLMITOOL are available on the EECS Instructional UNIX computers. (See http://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/clients for a list of computer n

s.berkeley.edu/clients for a list of computer names and locations). It is used in EE290N and EE227A. It is distributed free from Version 2.0 is installed in ~ee290n/lmitool Version 2.2 is installed in /share/b/LMITOOL LMITOOL Document
